code:
%% Agent Negotiation State Diagram
%% Render with: mmdc -i agent-negotiation-state.mmd -o agent-negotiation-state.png

%%{init: {"theme": "dark"}}%%
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> TaskQueued
    TaskQueued --> ContextHydrated: Load memory snapshot
    ContextHydrated --> AgentSelection: Capability match
    AgentSelection --> DraftResponses: Agents generate outputs
    DraftResponses --> ConfidenceVoting: Share confidence scores
    ConfidenceVoting --> ConsensusReached: Agreement within threshold
    ConfidenceVoting --> ConflictDetected: Divergent outputs
    ConflictDetected --> MetaSynthesis: Meta-agent summarizes & scores
    MetaSynthesis --> ConsensusReached: Synthesized result accepted
    ConsensusReached --> MemoryUpdate: Persist to Redis/Postgres/Qdrant
    MemoryUpdate --> [*]

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个多智能体协商的状态流转图，核心场景是：任务进来后，系统先加载记忆快照，然后做能力匹配选agent，最后通过置信度投票来达成共识或者进入冲突处理。
确认一下流程：起始状态是任务队列，然后加载记忆到ContextHydrated，接着AgentSelection做能力匹配，之后进入DraftResponses让多个agent生成输出，再进入ConfidenceVoting分享各自的置信度分数——这个理解对吗？
对的，DraftResponses到ConfidenceVoting这一步是关键，每个agent要share自己的confidence score。然后投票结果分两条路：如果agreement在threshold内就走到ConsensusReached，如果divergent就进入ConflictDetected。
ConflictDetected之后我设计了一个MetaSynthesis节点，由meta-agent来summarize和score，然后再尝试推进到ConsensusReached。这样冲突处理有闭环，你看可以吗？
可以，MetaSynthesis这个设计好。那ConsensusReached之后呢？需要persist到存储层，我考虑用Redis做缓存，Postgres做持久化，Qdrant做向量检索。
好，我加上MemoryUpdate节点，标注persist到Redis/Postgres/Qdrant，然后流向终止状态。另外我在图头加了dark主题和渲染命令注释，方便后面出png。
ContextHydrated到AgentSelection的转移条件，我写的是"Capability match"，AgentSelection到DraftResponses是"Agents generate outputs"，这样描述准确吗？
准确，我都已经标注好了。另外ConfidenceVoting到ConsensusReached是"Agreement within threshold"，到ConflictDetected是"Divergent outputs"，MetaSynthesis到ConsensusReached是"Synthesized result accepted"，整个流转逻辑完整了。
